title: calea ternifolia var. hypoleuca
intro: Calea ternifolia var. hypoleuca, also known as Mexican Dream Herb or False Dagga, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural sedative, anti-inflammatory, and anxiolytic, making it a potential remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and other sleep disorders. The health benefits of this plant include promoting relaxation, reducing stress, and improving sleep quality, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Calea ternifolia var. hypoleuca can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used depending on individual needs and preferences.
